memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Count of Ponthiu and Montreuil, 1171.  Fought in wars against the English; Crusader; died on the 3rd Crusade.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NORTHERN%20FRANCE.htm#JeanIPonthieudied1191 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Ier de Ponthieu於1141年出生時，他的父親Guy de Ponthieu II26歲，母親Ida de Saint-Pol35歲。他於1170年12月4日之前與Beatrice St Pol結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1191年6月30日在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年50歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Ier de Ponthieu于1141年出生时，他的父亲Guy de Ponthieu II26岁，母亲Ida de Saint-Pol35岁。他于1170年12月4日之前与Beatrice St Pol结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1191年6月30日在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年50岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of Ponthieu, a habitational name from Ponthieu, a region (former county) in Picardy, between the rivers Authie and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Ier de Ponthieu was born in 1141, his father, Guy de Ponthieu II, was 26 and his mother, Ida de Saint-Pol, was 35. He married Beatrice St Pol before 4 December 1170. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 30 June 1191, in Acre, Northern, Palestine, at the age of 50, and was buried in Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Ier de Ponthieu est né en 1141, son père, Guy de Ponthieu II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ida de Saint-Pol, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice St Pol avant 4 décembre 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1191, à Acre, Northern, Palestine, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Ier de Ponthieu 1141 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Ponthieu II 26 und seine Mutter Ida de Saint-Pol 35. Er hat vor 4. Dezember 1170 Beatrice St Pol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Juni 1191 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Palästina und wurde in Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Ier de Ponthieu è nato il nel 1141, il suo padre, Guy de Ponthieu II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ida de Saint-Pol, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice St Pol prima del 4 dicembre 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 giugno 1191, nel Acre, Northern, Palestina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Ier de Ponthieuが1141年に生まれた時，父Guy de Ponthieu IIは26歳，母Ida de Saint-Polは35歳であった。1170年12月4日以前にBeatrice St Polと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1191年6月30日にパレスチナمنطقة الشمالعكّاで50歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Ier de Ponthieu(이)가 1141년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Ponthieu II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida de Saint-Pol(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1170년 12월 4일 이전 Beatrice St Pol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1191년 6월 30일 팔레스타인 منطقة الشمال عكّا에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Ier de Ponthieu nasceu em 1141, seu pai, Guy de Ponthieu II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ida de Saint-Pol, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice St Pol antes 4 de dezembro de 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de junho de 1191, em Acre, Northern, Palestina, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Ier de Ponthieu родился в 1141 г., его отцу по имени Guy de Ponthieu II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida de Saint-Pol, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice St Pol перед 4 декабрь 1170 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 июня 1191 г. в местности عكّا, منطقة الشمال, Палестина в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

sm.from 1166 to 1178: mai le 1166 e o'o I le 1178

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Ier de Ponthieu nació en 1141, su papá, Guy de Ponthieu II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ida de Saint-Pol, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Beatrice St Pol antes de 4 de diciembre de 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de junio de 1191, en Acre, Northern, Palestina, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
